hero.title: Book Perfect Venues for Your Events
hero.subtitle: Discover and book amazing event spaces with ease. From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, find the perfect venue in minutes.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful features to make event planning effortless

smartSearch.title: Smart Search
smartSearch.description: Filter venues by location, capacity, price, and amenities to find exactly what you need.

realTime.title: Real-Time Availability
realTime.description: Check venue availability instantly and book your preferred dates in real-time.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
securePayments.description: Safe and secure payment processing with buyer protection for peace of mind.

directComm.title: Direct Communication
directComm.description: Chat directly with venue owners to discuss your event requirements.

reviews.title: Verified Reviews
reviews.description: Read authentic reviews from past clients to make informed decisions.

premiumVenues.title: Premium Venues
premiumVenues.description: Access to exclusive and high-quality event spaces.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Book your perfect venue in three simple steps

step1.title: Search & Discover
step1.description: Browse through hundreds of verified venues. Use filters to find spaces that match your event requirements.

step2.title: Connect & Confirm
step2.description: Send booking requests, chat with owners, and finalize all the details for your perfect event.

step3.title: Host Your Event
step3.description: Complete secure payment and get ready to host an unforgettable event at your chosen venue.

venueOwner.title: Own a Venue?
venueOwner.subtitle: Join our platform and connect with thousands of event planners looking for the perfect space. Maximize your bookings and grow your business.

visibility.title: Increase Visibility
visibility.description: Reach a wider audience and get more booking requests

bookings.title: Manage Bookings
bookings.description: Easy-to-use dashboard to handle all your reservations

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.description: Track performance and optimize your listing

cta.title: Ready to Plan Your Next Event?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied clients who found their perfect venue on Eventat

footer.tagline: Making event planning effortless, one venue at a time.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that works best for you
